testsuite.name: insurance Policy API — quote → bind → claim lifecycle (REST / OpenAPI)

testcase.name: price a quote (the REST front door to the rating engine)
bind a policy from a quote
list policies
testcase.system-out:
* baseUrl Given 'policies' When get request: 1 > GET http://localhost:42465/policies 1 > Host: localhost:42465 1 > Connection: keep-alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/5.6.1 (Java/21.0.11)
response time in milliseconds: 4 1 < 200 GET http://localhost:42465/policies 1 < content-length: 2 1 < Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 [ ]
GET http://localhost:42465/policies 200 (4 ms) Then 200 And response == '#array'

testcase.name: fetch a missing policy is a 404
file a claim against a policy
